mapper.sql: select record_id, elder_id, account_id, expense_type, transaction_type, amount, description, related_id, related_type, balance_before, balance_after, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from expense_record
mapper.select: SELECT er.record_id, er.elder_id, er.account_id, er.expense_type, er.transaction_type, er.amount, er.description, er.related_id, er.related_type, er.balance_before, er.balance_after, er.create_by, er.create_time, er.update_by, er.update_time, er.remark, ei.elder_name, pi.institution_name FROM expense_record er LEFT JOIN elder_info ei ON er.elder_id = ei.elder_id LEFT JOIN account_info ai ON er.account_id = ai.account_id LEFT JOIN pension_institution pi ON ai.institution_id = pi.institution_id where er.record_id = #{recordId}

SELECT er.record_id, er.elder_id, er.account_id, er.expense_type, er.transaction_type, er.amount, er.description, er.related_id, er.related_type, er.balance_before, er.balance_after, er.create_by, er.create_time, er.update_by, er.update_time, er.remark, ei.elder_name, pi.institution_name FROM expense_record er LEFT JOIN elder_info ei ON er.elder_id = ei.elder_id LEFT JOIN account_info ai ON er.account_id = ai.account_id LEFT JOIN pension_institution pi ON ai.institution_id = pi.institution_id where er.elder_id = #{elderId} ORDER BY er.create_time DESC

SELECT er.record_id, er.elder_id, er.account_id, er.expense_type, er.transaction_type, er.amount, er.description, er.related_id, er.related_type, er.balance_before, er.balance_after, er.create_by, er.create_time, er.update_by, er.update_time, er.remark, ei.elder_name, pi.institution_name FROM expense_record er LEFT JOIN elder_info ei ON er.elder_id = ei.elder_id LEFT JOIN account_info ai ON er.account_id = ai.account_id LEFT JOIN pension_institution pi ON ai.institution_id = pi.institution_id where er.account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY er.create_time DESC

SELECT er.record_id, er.elder_id, er.account_id, er.expense_type, er.transaction_type, er.amount, er.description, er.related_id, er.related_type, er.balance_before, er.balance_after, er.create_by, er.create_time, er.update_by, er.update_time, er.remark, ei.elder_name, pi.institution_name FROM expense_record er LEFT JOIN elder_info ei ON er.elder_id = ei.elder_id LEFT JOIN account_info ai ON er.account_id = ai.account_id LEFT JOIN pension_institution pi ON ai.institution_id = pi.institution_id where er.related_id = #{relatedId} and er.related_type = #{relatedType} ORDER BY er.create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT er.record_id, er.elder_id, er.account_id, er.expense_type, er.transaction_type, er.amount, er.description, er.related_id, er.related_type, er.balance_before, er.balance_after, er.create_by, er.create_time, er.update_by, er.update_time, er.remark, ei.elder_name, pi.institution_name FROM expense_record er LEFT JOIN elder_info ei ON er.elder_id = ei.elder_id LEFT JOIN account_info ai ON er.account_id = ai.account_id LEFT JOIN pension_institution pi ON ai.institution_id = pi.institution_id where er.elder_id = #{elderId} and er.expense_type = #{expenseType} ORDER BY er.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
insert into expense_record
elder_id, account_id, expense_type, transaction_type, amount, description, related_id, related_type, balance_before, balance_after, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{elderId}, #{accountId}, #{expenseType}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{description}, #{relatedId}, #{relatedType}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from expense_record where record_id in
#{recordId}
